highestPriorityImprovements.description: 11 graph validation issue(s) with code CONTROLLER_MISSING_MODULE.
highestPriorityImprovements.suggestedFix: Resolve framework module declarations and register controllers under their declaring module.
evidence: Controller controller:src/admin/admin.controller.ts:AdminController is not declared by a module.
Controller controller:src/auth/auth.controller.ts:AuthController is not declared by a module.
Controller controller:src/deprecated/observation/observation.controller.ts:ObservationController is not declared by a module.
Controller controller:src/deprecated/patient/patient.controller.ts:PatientController is not declared by a module.
Controller controller:src/deprecated/questionnaire/questionnaire.controller.ts:QuestionnaireController is not declared by a module.

highestPriorityImprovements.description: 4 graph validation issue(s) with code DUPLICATE_CONTROLLER.
highestPriorityImprovements.suggestedFix: Add a deterministic fixture for this validation issue and repair the graph construction invariant.
evidence: Multiple controllers share name AuthController.
Multiple controllers share name ObservationController.
Multiple controllers share name PatientController.
Multiple controllers share name QuestionnaireController.

highestPriorityImprovements.description: 69 graph validation issue(s) with code PROVIDER_WITHOUT_CONSUMERS.
highestPriorityImprovements.suggestedFix: Improve provider consumer detection or mark intentionally public/root providers with explicit metadata.
evidence:
Provider provider:{
      provide: IOT_NODE_HANDLERS,
      useFactory: (
        store: StoreInOvokNode,
        signals: SendToSignalsNode,
        enrich: EnrichNode,
        dedup: DedupNode,
        setLive: SetLiveKeyNode,
        switchNode: SwitchNode,
        raiseCr: RaiseCommunicationRequestNode,
        lua: LuaScriptNode,
        webhook: ExternalWebhookNode,
        bot: ExecuteBotNode,
        threshold: ThresholdNode,
        exists: ExistsNode,
        fetchRes: FetchResourceNode,
      ) => [store, signals, enrich, dedup, setLive, switchNode, raiseCr, lua, webhook, bot, threshold, exists, fetchRes],
      inject: [
        StoreInOvokNode,
        SendToSignalsNode,
        EnrichNode,
        DedupNode,
        SetLiveKeyNode,
        SwitchNode,
        RaiseCommunicationRequestNode,
        LuaScriptNode,
        ExternalWebhookNode,
        ExecuteBotNode,
        ThresholdNode,
        ExistsNode,
        FetchResourceNode,
      ],
    } has no graph-visible consumers.

Provider provider:// b1/b2/b3 additive — admin surface for device+token management +
    // transport-config discovery has no graph-visible consumers.

Provider provider:// Existing (untouched)
    IotDeviceService has no graph-visible consumers.

Provider provider:// Registry collects handlers via a factory over the concrete
    // classes above so DI resolves them once has no graph-visible consumers.

Provider provider:// Slice 3 additive
    IotDeviceTokenService has no graph-visible consumers.

highestPriorityImprovements.description: Graphify full semantic extraction was unavailable without an LLM backend.
highestPriorityImprovements.suggestedFix: For release validation, configure a deterministic Graphify semantic backend or keep the structural fallback as a separate benchmark lane.
evidence: Graphify exited with code 1.
Full Graphify extraction required an LLM backend for repository docs/images.
Graphify comparison uses a code-only projection with 185 files.

highestPriorityImprovements.description: Ontoly did not emit EXTENDS, while Graphify emitted 55.
highestPriorityImprovements.suggestedFix: Add or extend relationship extraction for EXTENDS and cover it with deterministic snapshots.
evidence: Normalized Graphify EXTENDS count: 55
